settings.remindersStep1: Every evening at 7 PM — a short reminder for you.
settings.remindersStep2: Tap it → list of tomorrow's clients.
settings.remindersStep3: Each has a “Remind” button — ready text in WhatsApp, one tap.
settings.remindersPreviewMsg: Hi Anna! Just a reminder of your appointment tomorrow at 2:00 PM for “Manicure”. If plans change, let me know 🙏
settings.remindersNote: Messages aren't sent automatically — you decide who and when. It's just a reminder + ready-made text.
settings.remindersPermBody: Allow notifications in your phone settings to get the evening reminder.
settings.batteryHintBody: Some phones (Xiaomi, Huawei, Samsung, Oppo) put apps to sleep and delay reminders. Allow MasterBook to run in the background and turn off battery optimization for it.
settings.workHoursEndAfterStart: End of the working day must be later than the start
settings.accountBiometricOn: Require biometrics when opening the app
settings.accountBiometricUnavailableBody: Biometrics are not set up on this device. Enable Face ID / Touch ID / fingerprint in your system settings.
settings.accountClearDemoSub: Deletes all clients, services, appointments and finances
settings.accountClearDemoBody: All clients, services, appointments and finances will be deleted. If you added your own data on top of the sample — it will be deleted too. This action is irreversible.
settings.accountTaxReportSub: For the current month — for self-employed personal records
settings.accountExportSub: Save clients, appointments and finances to JSON
settings.accountDeleteSub: All your data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
settings.accountDeleteConfirmBody: This is an irreversible action. All your clients, appointments and finances will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
settings.accountDeleteServerFailedTitle: Deleted locally, not on the server
settings.currencyHint: Changes display only. Already saved amounts are not recalculated.
settings.reviewLinkIntro: When you mark an appointment as completed, an "Ask for a review" button appears. It opens WhatsApp with a thank-you template and your link.
settings.reviewLinkSourceYandex: A profile on Yandex Maps / Business
settings.reviewLinkInvalid: URL must start with http:// or https://
settings.calendarIntro: Appointments will appear in your phone's system calendar. It's convenient — your visits show up in iPhone Calendar, Google Calendar and on Apple Watch.
settings.calendarSyncActive: Active — new appointments appear in the calendar
settings.calendarPermissionBody: Open Settings → MasterBook → Calendar and grant access. Then come back and turn on the switch.
settings.calendarNoteSeparate: A separate "MasterBook" calendar is created — you can hide it in system settings at any time.
settings.calendarNoteKeepEvents: When turned off, already synced events stay in the system. You can delete them manually in the system calendar.
settings.calendarNoteLocal: This is local sync — data is not sent to our server.
